data.title: Trump Team Adjusts Meteora LP Holdings
data.description:
According to Foresight News, on-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa has reported that the TRUMP team has made adjustments to the Meteora LP holdings. Previously, two liquidity addresses had withdrawn all LP tokens and transferred them to a DEV address starting with 5e2qR, which now manages the LP.

In the past 10 hours, the DEV address has injected 6.99 million TRUMP tokens, valued at approximately $130 million, and 290 million USDC into the TRUMP/USDC trading pair. This accounts for 91% of the total liquidity pool funds.

data.title: Raydium's Derivatives Trading Volume Reaches $100 Million Daily
data.description:
According to Odaily, Raydium, a prominent platform within the Solana ecosystem, has seen its derivatives contract trading volume reach $100 million daily just weeks after launch. These contracts allow cryptocurrency traders to speculate on price fluctuations without holding the actual tokens. Raydium has quickly become the third most popular perpetual contract trading platform on Solana, following Jupiter and Drift. Despite being in its early stages, Raydium's growth remains robust, with no marketing funds yet allocated for the officially unreleased trading tool. InfraRAY, a core contributor to the project, emphasized the enduring influence of the Raydium brand.

Interestingly, most traders using Raydium's derivatives platform access its services through trading aggregators rather than visiting its website directly. These aggregators distribute orders across multiple venues, potentially reducing Raydium's direct activity and weakening its relationship with traders. InfraRAY noted that while Raydium excels in market-making, establishing connections with takers can amplify network effects.

Additionally, Raydium's perpetual contract trading is supported by Orderly Network, which facilitates trading across multiple blockchains on a unified order book. Solana's perpetual contract traders now account for 25% of Orderly's total trading volume. Ran Yi, the CEO, stated that among the numerous projects offering Orderly-supported perpetual contract trading, daily trading volumes range between $200 million and $400 million.

data.title: U.S. Government Urged To Investigate Trump's Promotion Of Meme Coin
data.description: According to Odaily, the U.S. government, along with corporate and consumer watchdog Public Citizen, has called for a federal investigation into whether U.S. President Donald Trump's promotion of a meme coin violates laws against soliciting gifts. Concerns have been raised about the potential for untraceable foreign payments. Public Citizen filed a formal complaint on Wednesday with the Department of Justice and the Office of Government Ethics, alleging that Trump's social media posts have been used to promote the TRUMP token since he took office in January. The Department of Justice, the Office of Government Ethics, and Public Citizen have not immediately responded to requests for comment. In the complaint, Bartlett Naylor and Craig Holman of Public Citizen stated that Trump appears to be "soliciting money without compensation, essentially asking for gifts that benefit him personally." The complaint outlines several legal issues surrounding Trump's promotion of the meme coin, involving multiple overlapping areas of federal law, constitutional provisions, and ethical guidelines.

data.title: Bake.io to Cease Operations in Singapore by May 2025
data.description:
According to Odaily, Singapore-based crypto investment firm Cake Group has announced via email that its product, Bake.io, will cease operations in Singapore starting May 1, 2025. This decision follows the platform's transition to new management. A statement from the London Stock Exchange on January 2, 2025, revealed that Cake Group sold Bake to GSTechnologies Ltd., a company focused on fintech, last month. Details of the transaction remain undisclosed.

Financial records from GSTechnologies indicate that as of September 2024, the company held only $3.26 million in cash and digital assets. In January of this year, GSTechnologies announced it had raised $626,000. Previously, Cake Group, whose primary business was Bake, claimed to hold $1 billion in assets, with a revenue of $631 million in 2021. The latest financial data submitted by Cake Group in 2023 showed assets totaling $169 million. It remains unclear how much of these assets Cake Group retains following the sale of Bake.

data.title: Ethereum Faces Growing Competition Amid Market Dynamics
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, on February 6, analysts from JPMorgan highlighted that Ethereum is experiencing ongoing pressure from competitors. The report indicates that despite an overall rise in the cryptocurrency market, Ethereum's performance has lagged behind Bitcoin and other tokens, with its market capitalization share dropping to a four-year low.

The analysts attribute this trend to two main factors: the competitive pressure from public chains like Solana and layer-2 networks offering lower fees and higher scalability, and Ethereum's lack of a strong narrative compared to Bitcoin's positioning as a store of value.

Even after Ethereum's Dencun upgrade, which introduced blobs to reduce fees and enhance scalability, activity has increasingly shifted from Ethereum's main network to layer-2 networks, thereby weakening the base chain.

data.title: Significant Bitcoin Outflow From CEX Reaches Record Levels
data.description: According to Odaily, data shared by Bitwise Research Director Andrew Dragosch from Glassnode indicates that over 17,000 BTC were withdrawn from centralized exchanges (CEX) on Wednesday. At the current market price of $98,600 per Bitcoin, this outflow is valued at more than $1.6 billion. This marks the largest single-day outflow since April 2024.

data.title: Qualcomm CEO Highlights Benefits Of DeepSeek R1 Model
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on February 6, Qualcomm CEO Cristiano Amon discussed the advantages of the newly popular DeepSeek R1 model during an earnings call. Amon emphasized that Qualcomm's chips are well-suited for running the model efficiently on local devices rather than relying on cloud-based operations. He noted that DeepSeek R1 and similar models demonstrate that AI technology is advancing rapidly, becoming smaller, more powerful, and more efficient, with the capability to operate directly on devices.

data.title: The Fed cuts rates but Treasury yields are still rising, which could be a worrying trend
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: T. Rowe Price Capital Markets Strategist Tim Murray said in a report that despite the Fed's rate cuts, U.S. Treasury yields have continued to rise in recent months, which is a worrying trend. Although the 10-year U.S. Treasury yield has partially retreated from its recent peak, the overall trend is still rising. Equally worrying is that the stock market has also felt the pain of high interest rates. The correlation between the U.S. bond market and the stock market has been rising since mid-December last year. (Jinshi)

data.title: U.S. economic health limits decline in 10-year Treasury yield
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: BBH market strategists said in a report that the U.S. economy is still in good shape, limiting the room for the 10-year U.S. Treasury yield and the dollar to fall. The annual growth rate of the U.S. economy is well above the long-term trend growth rate of 1.8%. Importantly, the solid U.S. labor market conditions indicate that consumer spending will remain the main driver of economic growth. (Jinshi)

data.title: U.S. Economy Remains Strong, Limiting Treasury Yield Decline
data.description: According to Odaily, market strategists at BBH report that the U.S. economy continues to perform well, which restricts the potential decline in the 10-year U.S. Treasury yield and the dollar. The annual growth rate of the U.S. economy significantly exceeds the long-term trend growth rate of 1.8%. Notably, the robust condition of the U.S. labor market indicates that consumer spending will remain a key driver of economic growth.
